title: Aureline AI background branch-agent session, checkpoint, validation-plan, and audit-event vocabulary
description: Boundary schema for the branch_agent_session_record, branch_agent_checkpoint_record, branch_agent_validation_plan_record, and branch_agent_session_audit_event_record frozen in docs/ai/background_branch_agent_lifecycle.md. Every dispatch of a longer-running AI workflow into a current-worktree assist, isolated side-worktree, side-branch, ephemeral workspace, or managed remote workspace resolves to one branch_agent_session_record so reviewers, support, replay, and admin surfaces can answer where the work ran, what it could touch, what it could spend, what it must validate, and how it must land — without reading implementation code or provider logs. The schema composes with (and does not replace) schemas/ai/prompt_composer_session.schema.json (composer session, turn-draft, dispatch_target_class), schemas/ai/context_assembly.schema.json (assembly id, ai_branch_agent_dispatch_record), schemas/ai/request_workspace.schema.json and schemas/ai/request_workspace_ref.schema.json (request workspace and the typed cross-schema reference), schemas/ai/provider_route_receipt.schema.json and schemas/ai/spend_receipt.schema.json (per-hop receipts and the chain rollups), schemas/ai/graduation_packet.schema.json (rollout state, agent ceiling, exhaustion state), schemas/ai/prompt_tool_pack_manifest.schema.json (plan and pack identity), and schemas/integration/approval_ticket.schema.json (admitting approval ticket). Raw filesystem paths, raw worktree paths, raw branch names, raw remote workspace URIs, raw URLs, raw provider payloads, raw API keys, raw OAuth tokens, raw mTLS material, raw cost amounts in any specific currency, raw token counts, and raw user identifiers never cross this boundary; records carry opaque refs, structured fields, and coarse buckets only. The eventual branch-agent / orchestration crate's Rust types are the schema of record; this file is the cross-tool boundary every non-owning surface reads. Adding a new dispatch_origin_class, target_execution_locus_class, mutation_surface_class, secret_scope_class, session_state_class, pause_reason_class, cancel_outcome_class, landing_posture_class, checkpoint_class, triggering_class, checkpoint_outcome_class, validation_check_class, expected_outcome_class, observed_outcome_class, audit_event_id, or denial_reason value is additive-minor and requires a branch_agent_session_schema_version bump; repurposing an existing value is breaking and requires a new decision row.

branch_agent_session_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for this branch-agent session vocabulary export. Current value is 1. Bumped only on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields do not bump this version.

record_kind.description: Discriminator for the concrete payload shape. Every record carries exactly one kind.

opaque_id.description: Opaque, stable id safe to log, safe on RPC, safe in manifests / journal entries / support bundles / evidence packets. Raw paths, raw worktree paths, raw branch names, raw remote URIs, raw URLs, raw provider payloads, raw API keys, raw OAuth tokens, raw mTLS material, raw cost amounts, raw token counts, and raw user identifiers never appear here.

monotonic_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp produced from a monotonic clock source.

reviewable_sentence.description: Short human-readable sentence safe to show in branch-agent review, admin reconciliation, support exports, and replay surfaces. Never quotes raw URLs, raw paths, raw provider payloads, raw cost amounts, raw token counts, or raw user identifiers.

dispatch_origin_class.description: Frozen dispatch-origin vocabulary naming where the branch-agent session was originated. dispatched_no_origin_disabled is the canonical state for a row that exists but MUST NOT be cited; a session whose dispatch_origin_class resolves there denies with dispatch_origin_class_unresolved.

target_execution_locus_class.description: Frozen target-execution-locus vocabulary. The five non-mock loci correspond to five different risk classes; an allOf gate pairs locus to mutation surface so the same 'agent' label cannot hide an escalation. disabled_no_locus is the canonical disabled state.

mutation_surface_class.description: Frozen mutation-surface vocabulary. Reviewers see exactly what filesystem / branch / remote state the session is admitted to change. mutates_active_worktree_under_user_view is admitted only with explicit user assent and only when the locus is current_worktree_assist.

secret_scope_class.description: Frozen secret-scope vocabulary naming which credentials / tokens / secret handles the session can reach. The session's class is narrower than or equal to the originating workspace's admitted data-class allowlist; widening denies with secret_scope_widens_originating_workspace.

session_state_class.description: Frozen session-state vocabulary. A session MUST advance through monotonic transitions only; re-opening a terminal session is forbidden. cancelled_* and session_completed_* and policy_blocked_pre_dispatch and disabled_no_dispatch are terminal.

pause_reason_class.description: Frozen pause-reason vocabulary. Required (non-empty) on a session whose session_state_class is one of the paused_* states.

cancel_outcome_class.description: Frozen cancel-outcome vocabulary. Required (non-empty) on a session whose session_state_class is one of the cancelled_* states. Cancellation never silently disappears the session; the row survives in audit / UI history.

landing_posture_class.description: Frozen landing-posture vocabulary. Reviewers see how the session's output may land. The schema's allOf gates pair landing posture to the minimum required landing-constraint set on the review packet.

agent_ceiling_class.description: Agent-ceiling class re-exported from schemas/ai/graduation_packet.schema.json without modification. agent_invocation_unbounded_admin_only requires a non-empty originating_approval_ticket_ref.

checkpoint_class.description: Frozen checkpoint-class vocabulary. The first checkpoint on a session MUST be of class pre_dispatch_plan_checkpoint.

validation_check_class.description: Frozen validation-check-class vocabulary. The must_run_* set re-exports the review-pack contract's must-run / provider-required check classes verbatim; the advisory_* set are non-blocking checks.

expected_outcome_class.description: Frozen expected-outcome vocabulary the validation-plan row commits to before the run.

observed_outcome_class.description: Frozen observed-outcome vocabulary the validation-plan row records after the run. Empty pre-run.

trust_state.description: ADR-0001 workspace-trust state at the moment the record was minted.

deployment_profile_class.description: Deployment-profile class re-exported from schemas/identity/policy_bundle.schema.json without modification. Narrower defaults (air_gapped, managed_fleet) MAY forbid a target_execution_locus_class, a mutation_surface_class, a secret_scope_class, or an agent_ceiling_class without re-minting any value.

execution_context_id.description: ADR-0009 execution-context id when the record was minted inside a live execution. Empty string when the record was minted outside an execution context.

policy_context.description: Policy context the record was minted under. Re-validated on every state change; a policy-epoch roll observed between dispatch and a per-hop emission denies with policy_epoch_rolled_invalidations.

redaction_class.description: Redaction class re-exported from schemas/governance/capability_lifecycle.schema.json without modification (ADR-0011). Raw URLs, raw paths, raw credential bodies, raw cost amounts, raw token counts, and raw user identifiers never cross this boundary regardless of class.

client_scope.description: Client-scope vocabulary re-exported from schemas/governance/capability_lifecycle.schema.json without modification (ADR-0011).

request_workspace_ref.description: Inline projection of schemas/ai/request_workspace_ref.schema.json's request_workspace_ref_record fields the session needs verbatim. The reference echoes the owning workspace's flow / scope / isolation / privacy / retention / lifecycle posture so reviewers do not have to resolve the owning record.

audit_event_id.description: Frozen audit-event ids on the ai_branch_agent_session audit stream. Events MUST NOT carry raw URLs, raw paths, raw worktree paths, raw branch names, raw remote URIs, raw provider payloads, raw cost amounts, raw token counts, or raw user identifiers.

denial_reason.description: Frozen denial-reason vocabulary. Denials fail closed; silent downgrade to a best-effort session, a best-effort checkpoint, or a generic 'AI agent ran' chip is forbidden.

branch_agent_chain_id.description: Stable opaque id binding every per-hop receipt and assembly to one chain. Re-exported on the route / spend rollups; reviewers diff per-hop receipts under this id.

originating_review_handoff_ref.description: Opaque ref to the originating review-handoff packet. Required (non-empty) when dispatch_origin_class = dispatched_from_review_handoff; empty otherwise.

originating_support_replay_ref.description: Opaque ref to the originating support-replay packet. Required (non-empty) when dispatch_origin_class = dispatched_from_support_replay; empty otherwise.

originating_admin_console_ref.description: Opaque ref to the originating admin-console invocation. Required (non-empty) when dispatch_origin_class = dispatched_from_admin_console; empty otherwise.

originating_extension_invocation_ref.description: Opaque ref to the originating extension invocation. Required (non-empty) when dispatch_origin_class = dispatched_from_extension_provided; empty otherwise.

prompt_pack_manifest_ref.description: Opaque ref to the prompt-pack manifest the dispatching turn cited. Empty string when the workflow does not require a prompt-pack.

tool_pack_manifest_ref.description: Opaque ref to the tool-pack manifest the dispatching turn cited. Empty string when the workflow does not require a tool-pack.

target_branch_identity_ref.description: Opaque ref to the branch row / branch identity the session targets. Empty string only on current_worktree_assist (which mutates the active branch under user view) and disabled_no_locus.

target_worktree_identity_ref.description: Opaque ref to the worktree row the session targets. Empty string on side_branch_no_worktree, managed_remote_workspace, mocked_test_locus, and disabled_no_locus.

pause_reason_class.description: Pause-reason class. Required (non-empty) when session_state_class is one of paused_for_checkpoint_review / paused_by_user / paused_by_policy. Empty string in every other state.

cancel_outcome_class.description: Cancel-outcome class. Required (non-empty) when session_state_class is one of cancelled_by_user / cancelled_by_policy / cancelled_by_budget / cancelled_by_route / cancelled_by_validation_failure. Empty string in every other state.

route_rollup_ref.description: Opaque ref to the chain's branch_agent_route_rollup_record on schemas/ai/provider_route_receipt.schema.json. Empty pre-dispatch; populated as soon as the first per-hop receipt emits.

spend_rollup_ref.description: Opaque ref to the chain's branch_agent_spend_rollup_record on schemas/ai/spend_receipt.schema.json. Empty pre-dispatch; populated as soon as the first per-hop spend receipt emits.

per_hop_route_receipt_refs.description: Opaque refs to per-hop provider_route_receipt_record rows under this chain. Empty pre-dispatch; bounded by the agent_ceiling_class.

per_hop_spend_receipt_refs.description: Opaque refs to per-hop spend_receipt_record rows under this chain. Empty pre-dispatch.

validation_plan_refs.description: Opaque refs to branch_agent_validation_plan_record rows the session committed to run.

checkpoint_refs.description: Opaque refs to branch_agent_checkpoint_record rows the session emitted, in mint order.

review_packet_ref.description: Opaque ref to the branch_agent_review_packet_record minted on terminal completion. Empty until the session reaches session_completed_review_only or session_completed_landed_via_review.

originating_approval_ticket_ref.description: Opaque ref to the admitting approval ticket. Required (non-empty) when agent_ceiling_class = agent_invocation_unbounded_admin_only or when policy pinned a non-default dispatch locus; empty otherwise.

supersedes_branch_agent_session_refs.description: Prior session ids this row supersedes (for example after a forced re-dispatch following a policy-epoch roll or an attempted escalation). Retiring a session is not a delete; the prior row survives in audit.

notes_summary.description: Short reviewer-visible sentence summarising the session. Never quotes raw URLs, raw paths, raw branch names, raw provider payloads, raw cost amounts, or raw token counts.

completed_at.description: Timestamp at which the session reached a terminal session_state_class. Null while the session is non-terminal.

allOf.description: current_worktree_assist MUST pair with no_mutation_read_only / proposes_diff_only_no_apply / mutation_disabled / mutation_unknown_unverified. The disabled / unknown values are admitted only on pre-dispatch, policy-blocked, or unverified rows.
isolated_side_worktree MUST pair with one of the no_mutation / propose / mutates_isolated_worktree_only set, plus the disabled / unknown values for pre-dispatch / policy-blocked / unverified rows.
side_branch_no_worktree MUST pair with no_mutation / propose / mutates_through_review_pipeline_only, plus the disabled / unknown values.
ephemeral_workspace MUST pair with no_mutation / propose / mutates_isolated_worktree_only / mutates_through_review_pipeline_only, plus the disabled / unknown values.
managed_remote_workspace MUST pair with no_mutation / propose / mutates_managed_remote_workspace_only / mutates_through_review_pipeline_only, plus the disabled / unknown values.
disabled_no_locus MUST pair with mutation_disabled and disabled_no_dispatch.
no_self_land_review_required MUST pair with proposes_diff_only_no_apply or mutates_through_review_pipeline_only.
landed_via_review_pipeline_only MUST pair with mutates_through_review_pipeline_only.
not_eligible_to_land_read_only MUST pair with no_mutation_read_only.
agent_invocation_unbounded_admin_only MUST cite a non-empty originating_approval_ticket_ref.
dispatched_from_review_handoff MUST cite a non-empty originating_review_handoff_ref.
dispatched_from_support_replay MUST cite a non-empty originating_support_replay_ref.
dispatched_from_admin_console MUST cite a non-empty originating_admin_console_ref.
dispatched_from_extension_provided MUST cite a non-empty originating_extension_invocation_ref.
Paused session_state_class values MUST cite a non-empty pause_reason_class.
Cancelled session_state_class values MUST cite a non-empty cancel_outcome_class.
Terminal session states MUST carry a non-null completed_at.
session_completed_review_only and session_completed_landed_via_review MUST cite a non-empty review_packet_ref.

branch_agent_session_record.description: Branch-agent session record. One row per dispatched / cancelled / paused / completed / policy-blocked branch-agent run; the row is the cross-tool boundary the rollout-review board, support export, replay harness, audit stream, and admin reconciliation surfaces all read.

checkpoint_index.description: Zero-based monotonic index inside the session. Reviewers read checkpoints in this order.

allOf.description: checkpoint_index = 0 MUST pair with checkpoint_class = pre_dispatch_plan_checkpoint.

branch_agent_checkpoint_record.description: Branch-agent checkpoint record. Append-only; a checkpoint never mutates a prior checkpoint. Reviewers read the checkpoint set in order to reconstruct what the session paused for, what mutation-surface posture was observed, and what was acknowledged before resuming.

referenced_check_bundle_ref.description: Opaque ref to the underlying check-bundle row (re-export from the review-pack contract). Empty string when the check is generic and not yet bound to a specific check-bundle ref.

observed_outcome_class.description: Observed outcome class. Empty string pre-run; one of the observed_outcome_class enum values post-run.

allOf.description: must_run_* validation_check_class values MUST carry expected_outcome_class = expected_outcome_pass_required.

branch_agent_validation_plan_record.description: Branch-agent validation-plan row. The session commits to a closed list of must-run / advisory checks before dispatch; a must-run row whose observed_outcome_class = outcome_failed forces the session into cancelled_by_validation_failure.

checkpoint_ref.description: Opaque ref to the branch_agent_checkpoint_record the event refers to. Empty string when the event is not checkpoint-scoped.

validation_plan_row_ref.description: Opaque ref to the branch_agent_validation_plan_record the event refers to. Empty string when the event is not validation-scoped.

review_packet_ref.description: Opaque ref to the branch_agent_review_packet_record the event refers to. Empty string when the event is not review-packet-scoped.

denial_reason.description: Optional denial_reason string from the denial_reason enum. Empty string for non-deny events.

allOf.description: branch_agent_session_denial_emitted MUST cite a non-empty denial_reason (one of the denial_reason enum values).

branch_agent_session_audit_event_record.description: Observable event on the ai_branch_agent_session audit stream. Events MUST NOT carry raw URLs, raw paths, raw worktree paths, raw branch names, raw remote URIs, raw provider payloads, raw cost amounts, raw token counts, or raw user identifiers.
